text:
In a bustling little town named Sweetwill, a squirrel named Sandy won the talent show twice in a row with her incredible vocal ability. Every morning she would serenade the birds with songs of her own creation. She lived in an old attic clubhouse, decorated with colorful feathers and old photographs.

One autumn, a storm blew in, bringing with it treasures from faraway lands. Sandy's favorite find was an ancient flute, carved from the skull of an owl. It didn't play music; it whispered secrets. Each night she would play it just before bedtime.

One quiet evening, the owl flute danced a dreamy tune right into Sandy's ears. She heard a tale of forgotten magic, a treasure hidden deep in the forest. Determined, she ventured past the spooky old mansion at the center of town.

Inside was a museum of oddities, each item telling a story. A chessboard with mice playing chess. A bird made entirely out of feathers. Sandy picked up the flute. On a
